text: I'm Brandon Bryan, I'm a partner here at Harlem Capital based in New York.
Harlem Capital is an early stage seed fund focused on investing in the next generation
of winners.
We are relentless.
We are always thinking about the next step.
We're always thinking about the brand, the story, the founders, our end consumers, which
are investors.
And we're keeping that number one.
We actually recently redid our company values and guess what that number one value is?
First things first and that's how we stay relentless.
A few things that I do in my free time.
Number one, salsa dancing.
I've been salsa dancing for a few years now.
I can salsa dance, bachata, merengue.
I've also gotten into Brazilian jiu-jitsu.
I'm starting to get pretty good.
A core belief of mine is trust wins everything.
Trust comes before every transaction.
So from my opinion, if you can actually build trust than anyone else with the people you
want to do business with or with the person you want to start a life with, you're going
to have an amazing life.
That means what type of person are you becoming every day?
How are you showing up?
What are you doing when no one is looking?
In the past life, I was a creator entrepreneur.
So in terms of the brand building, I helped launch our podcast, our newsletter, our founder
summit and many of our other new initiatives to really build what we call digital gravity.
That's when we build a brand so large that people have to come into our orbit.
I call the next chapter HCP 2.0, which is all about scale.
Everything that we've done over this first 10 years, so five years as an angel portfolio,
five years as an institutional fund, are now going to compound at light speed.
And that's what gets me up in the morning.
